← Feedbox

Privacy Policy

Last updated: March 19, 2026 · Effective immediately

TL;DR — We collect only what's needed to run Feedbox. We don't sell your data. We don't show ads. Your reading is private.

1. Who we are

Feedbox is an RSS reader and personal knowledge tool operated by BrainBits (brainbits.us). You can reach us at hello@brainbits.us.

2. What data we collect

We collect only what's necessary to run the service:

  • Account data — your email address and, if you sign in via OAuth, your name and avatar from GitHub or Google.
  • Reading data — the RSS feeds you subscribe to, articles you've read, articles you've saved, highlights and notes you create, and reading progress.
  • Usage data — basic server logs (IP address, browser type, timestamp) retained for up to 30 days for security and debugging.

We do not collect: browsing history outside Feedbox, device identifiers, advertising identifiers, or location data.

3. How we use your data

  • To provide and improve Feedbox features (reading, search, highlights, stats)
  • To sync your data across devices via Supabase
  • To send transactional emails (sign-in links, password resets)
  • To calculate anonymous, aggregated usage stats for product decisions

We never use your reading history or article content for advertising or sell it to third parties.

4. Third-party services

  • Supabase (supabase.com) — database and authentication. Hosted in the US. Privacy policy ↗
  • Anthropic Claude API — used only when you explicitly request an AI summary. Your article content is sent to Anthropic for that request only and not stored by Anthropic for training (per their API terms). Privacy policy ↗
  • CORS proxies — RSS feeds are fetched via proxy services (corsproxy.io, allorigins.win). These services see the RSS feed URL but not your identity.
  • Google Favicons API — we fetch favicon images using Google's favicon service, which receives the domain name of your feed sources.

5. Data retention

Your data is retained as long as your account is active. You can export all your data or delete your account at any time from Settings → Data & Privacy. On deletion, all data is permanently removed within 24 hours.

6. Your rights

You have the right to:

  • Access — export all your data as JSON from Settings → Data & Privacy
  • Erasure — delete your account and all associated data from Settings
  • Correction — update your email or account details via Supabase Auth
  • Portability — your data export includes everything in machine-readable JSON format

For requests or questions, email hello@brainbits.us.

7. Cookies and local storage

Feedbox uses browser localStorage (not cookies) to store your preferences (theme, view mode, feed cache) and session data. No third-party tracking cookies are used.

8. Security

All data is transmitted over HTTPS. Supabase enforces Row Level Security — your data is inaccessible to other users at the database level. Passwords are hashed by Supabase Auth and never visible to us.

9. Children

Feedbox is not directed at children under 13. We do not knowingly collect data from anyone under 13. If you believe we have, contact us immediately.

10. Changes to this policy

Material changes will be emailed to registered users at least 14 days before they take effect. The "Last updated" date at the top always reflects the current version.

11. Contact

Questions? Email hello@brainbits.us or write to BrainBits, Greenville, SC, USA.

© 2026 BrainBits · Feedbox · hello@brainbits.us
